        FOLLOW THE STRUCTURE OF WIREFRAME {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_4}} EXACTLY.
        
        STYLE: Leadiva Flat Institutional (Mint Pastel). 
        - Canvas/Background: #f4faf6.
        - Panels/Sidebar: #ffffff.
        - Borders: 1px solid #d5e8e0.
        - Primary Accent: Teal #05aba9.
        - Soft Mint: #d9eedb.
        - Text: #1c1917 (Primary), #5f6b66 (Secondary).
        - No gradients, no glass, no decorative shadows.

        LEFT SIDEBAR:
        - Fixed width (~260px), white background, 1px right border #d5e8e0.
        - TOP: Official Leadiva logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_16}} (rocket icon) and wordmark 'Leadiva'.
        - MIDDLE (History): Label 'Búsquedas anteriores' in secondary text. List items (text only, teal/mint hover): 'Licitaciones software gobierno El Salvador', 'RFP consultoría IA banca', 'Términos de referencia COMPRASAL IT'.
        - BOTTOM: Profile section with a circular avatar (initials 'DM', mint background, teal text) and name 'Diego Murillo Correa'.

        MAIN CONTENT:
        - Vertically and horizontally centered container.
        - Headline: '¿Qué tipo de oportunidades/licitaciones estás buscando?' (size xl/2xl, primary text).
        - Search Input: Wide box (~680px), white fill, 1px border #d5e8e0, rounded-md. Placeholder: 'Pregunta a Leadiva'. 
        - Visual focus on the search task. No KPIs, no tables, no top navbar.

        Language: Spanish. Title: '/ — Inicio (Pregunta a Leadiva)'","name":"projects/929484233158471895/screens/dbfc8f16cf264c4c87d293e5dc2de0b2","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","customColor":"#05aba9","headlineFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","bodyFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","labelFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","colorVariant":"TONAL_SPOT"},"deviceType":"DESKTOP","screenType":"DESIGN","screenMetadata":{"agentType":"PRO_AGENT","status":"COMPLETE"},"designSystem":{"name":"assets/8031487489663830885","designSystem":{"displayName":"Leadiva Mint Pastel","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","customColor":"#05aba9","headlineFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","bodyFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","labelFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","designMd":"# Leadiva Flat — Mint Pastel Palette (user-provided strip)

Exact hex from reference strip (left → right):
1. Soft coral #f9a79b
2. Light peach #fbcab9  ← companion LEFT of center
3. Pale mint #d9eedb   ← CENTER / brand core
4. Light aqua #9ce5de  ← companion RIGHT of center
5. Deep teal #05aba9   ← CTA / interactive (AA contrast)

## Role mapping
- Brand soft / selected / KPI accents / soft badges: #d9eedb (center mint)
- Warm companion (zebra tint, secondary soft panels, warm chips): #fbcab9
- Cool companion (secondary buttons, borders accent, tags): #9ce5de
- Primary CTA, links, active nav bar, focus ring: #05aba9 (deep teal from same strip)
- CTA hover: darken teal ≈ #048f8d
- Optional warm accent for soft coral status open: #f9a79b

## Surfaces
- surface.base: #f4faf6 (mint-tinted canvas)
- surface.raised: #ffffff
- surface.border: #d5e8e0

## Text
- text.primary: #1c1917
- text.secondary: #5f6b66

## Status
- open: #05aba9 (or soft fill #d9eedb + text #048f8d)
- evaluating: use warm peach text on soft #fbcab9
- won: #05aba9 / mint family
- lost: keep semantic red #dc2626
- expiring: soft coral #f9a79b border/text
- inactive: #a8a29e

## Rules
Flat Institutional. No blue, no purple, no coral-as-primary CTA.
Center the UI around mint #d9eedb with peach + aqua companions.
CTAs must use deep teal #05aba9 for white text contrast.
1px borders, no skeuomorphism.

- **Branded Sidebar**: The left sidebar includes the official black line-art logo, a clean history list under "Búsquedas anteriores," and the user profile at the bottom.

theme.designMd:
# Leadiva Flat — Mint Pastel Palette (user-provided strip)

Exact hex from reference strip (left → right):
1. Soft coral #f9a79b
2. Light peach #fbcab9  ← companion LEFT of center
3. Pale mint #d9eedb   ← CENTER / brand core
4. Light aqua #9ce5de  ← companion RIGHT of center
5. Deep teal #05aba9   ← CTA / interactive (AA contrast)

## Role mapping
- Brand soft / selected / KPI accents / soft badges: #d9eedb (center mint)
- Warm companion (zebra tint, secondary soft panels, warm chips): #fbcab9
- Cool companion (secondary buttons, borders accent, tags): #9ce5de
- Primary CTA, links, active nav bar, focus ring: #05aba9 (deep teal from same strip)
- CTA hover: darken teal ≈ #048f8d
- Optional warm accent for soft coral status open: #f9a79b

## Surfaces
- surface.base: #f4faf6 (mint-tinted canvas)
- surface.raised: #ffffff
- surface.border: #d5e8e0

## Text
- text.primary: #1c1917
- text.secondary: #5f6b66

## Status
- open: #05aba9 (or soft fill #d9eedb + text #048f8d)
- evaluating: use warm peach text on soft #fbcab9
- won: #05aba9 / mint family
- lost: keep semantic red #dc2626
- expiring: soft coral #f9a79b border/text
- inactive: #a8a29e

## Rules
Flat Institutional. No blue, no purple, no coral-as-primary CTA.
Center the UI around mint #d9eedb with peach + aqua companions.
CTAs must use deep teal #05aba9 for white text contrast.
1px borders, no skeuomorphism.

screens.prompt:
Route: / — Inicio (Pregunta a Leadiva). 
        
        FOLLOW THE STRUCTURE OF WIREFRAME {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_4}} EXACTLY.
        
        STYLE: Leadiva Flat Institutional (Mint Pastel). 
        - Canvas/Background: #f4faf6.
        - Panels/Sidebar: #ffffff.
        - Borders: 1px solid #d5e8e0.
        - Primary Accent: Teal #05aba9.
        - Soft Mint: #d9eedb.
        - Text: #1c1917 (Primary), #5f6b66 (Secondary).
        - No gradients, no glass, no decorative shadows.

        LEFT SIDEBAR:
        - Fixed width (~260px), white background, 1px right border #d5e8e0.
        - TOP: Official Leadiva logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_16}} (rocket icon) and wordmark 'Leadiva'.
        - MIDDLE (History): Label 'Búsquedas anteriores' in secondary text. List items (text only, teal/mint hover): 'Licitaciones software gobierno El Salvador', 'RFP consultoría IA banca', 'Términos de referencia COMPRASAL IT'.
        - BOTTOM: Profile section with a circular avatar (initials 'DM', mint background, teal text) and name 'Diego Murillo Correa'.

        MAIN CONTENT:
        - Vertically and horizontally centered container.
        - Headline: '¿Qué tipo de oportunidades/licitaciones estás buscando?' (size xl/2xl, primary text).
        - Search Input: Wide box (~680px), white fill, 1px border #d5e8e0, rounded-md. Placeholder: 'Pregunta a Leadiva'. 
        - Visual focus on the search task. No KPIs, no tables, no top navbar.

        Language: Spanish. Title: '/ — Inicio (Pregunta a Leadiva)'
screens.title: / — Inicio (Pregunta a Leadiva)

outputComponents.text:
I have generated the Leadiva home search landing page, adhering strictly to your wireframe structure and the Leadiva Mint Pastel design system.

### Design Highlights:
- **Focused Search Experience**: The main content area is centered and minimalist, featuring the "Pregunta a Leadiva" search bar and the primary headline, exactly as specified in the wireframe.
- **Branded Sidebar**: The left sidebar includes the official black line-art logo, a clean history list under "Búsquedas anteriores," and the user profile at the bottom.
- **Flat Institutional Aesthetic**: The design uses a clean palette of mint (#f4faf6), white panels, and teal (#05aba9) accents, with 1px borders and no decorative shadows or gradients.
- **Functional History**: I've included the specific search items you requested to demonstrate the history list's appearance.

The screen is now available on the canvas as **"/ — Inicio (Pregunta a Leadiva)"** / — Inicio (Pregunta a Leadiva).

outputComponents.suggestion: Add a subtle hover animation to the search input
Show how the search results list would look on this page
Change the sidebar to dark mode for better contrast
